_instructions: Agent reads this file to build the onboarding skill catalog. Only entries with user_facing=true are shown to users. Group by 'group', sort within group by 'sort_order'. Infrastructure skills (DSL, fee optimizer, scanners) have user_facing=false and are never displayed.

skills.name: FOX
skills.tagline: Catches explosive First Jumps on the leaderboard before the crowd.

skills.name: Viper
skills.tagline: Trades range-bound chop at support/resistance. Works when nothing is trending.

skills.name: Grizzly
skills.tagline: BTC only. Every signal source. 15-20x leverage. Maximum conviction.

skills.name: Cheetah
skills.tagline: HYPE only. 8-12x leverage. Fastest predator for the fastest asset.

skills.name: Tiger
skills.tagline: 5 parallel scanners, 230 assets, auto-optimizer that learns from results.

skills.name: Cobra
skills.tagline: Triple convergence. Only strikes when price, volume, and new money all agree.

skills.name: Bison
skills.tagline: Conviction holder. Top 10 assets, 4h trend thesis, holds hours to days.

skills.name: Hawk
skills.tagline: Scans 4 markets every 30s, picks the single strongest signal.

skills.name: Scorpion
skills.tagline: Mirrors whale wallets. Exits the instant they do.

skills.name: Owl
skills.tagline: Pure contrarian. Enters against extreme crowding when exhaustion signals fire.

skills.name: Croc
skills.tagline: Funding rate arbitrage. Collects payments while waiting for the snap.

skills.name: Shark
skills.tagline: Smart money consensus + liquidation cascade front-running.

skills.name: Wolf
skills.tagline: Pack hunter. Leaderboard momentum, enters early on what smart money is buying.

skills.name: Dire Wolf
skills.tagline: Wolf in sniper mode. Fewer trades, zero rotation, maker fees.

skills.name: Feral Fox
skills.tagline: FOX with higher conviction filters. Score 7+, 3 reasons minimum.

skills.name: Ghost Fox
skills.tagline: Feral Fox + infinite trailing at 85% of peak. No ceiling.

skills.name: Mamba
skills.tagline: Viper + infinite trailing. Catches the bounce AND the breakout.
